I also questioned Ahu-waqar son of Zurzur, and he answered: "Ilī-bāni son of Baši-ilī has the memorandum." I seized Azu and he answered: "I shall take enough, either in silver or from your at 5 shekels per piece." He said further: "At your departure I shall seal the silver and its interest"; and I seized Šukkutum about the -textile and he answered: "The is available."
